name: Cross-Platform Compiler Build

# This triggers the build every time you push code
on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build on ${{ matrix.os }}
    # Boot up 3 different virtual machines
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Source Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    # --- LINUX SETUP ---
    - name: Install Dependencies (Linux)
      if: matrix.os == 'ubuntu-latest'
      run: |
        sudo apt-get update
        sudo apt-get install -y flex bison g++

    # --- MACOS SETUP ---
    - name: Install Dependencies (macOS)
      if: matrix.os == 'macos-latest'
      run: |
        brew install flex bison

    # --- WINDOWS SETUP ---
    - name: Install Dependencies (Windows)
      if: matrix.os == 'windows-latest'
      run: |
        choco install winflexbison3

    # --- COMPILATION STEP ---
    - name: Compile Lexer and Parser
      shell: bash
      run: |
        if [ "$RUNNER_OS" == "Windows" ]; then
          win_bison -d parser.y
          win_flex lexer.l
          g++ parser.tab.c lex.yy.c -o anc.exe
        else
          bison -d parser.y
          flex lexer.l
          g++ parser.tab.c lex.yy.c -o anc
        fi

    # --- PACKAGING STEP ---
    - name: Upload Compiled Binary
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
      with:
        name: anc-compiler-${{ matrix.os }}
        path: |
          anc.exe
          anc
        if-no-files-found: ignore
